top_signals.title: Trump’s pledge to unleash a ‘golden age’ of US manufacturing sputters
top_signals.summary: Spending on new factories has fallen while industry executives point to uneven recovery
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Polymarket Lets You Bet on Vibes
top_signals.summary: By taking bets on social media clout, the prediction market has made itself vulnerable to bots.

top_signals.title: European Prize for Women Innovators 2026 celebrates visionary women
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 04 Jun 2026 Today, the European Commission revealed the winners of the 12th edition of the European Prize for Women Innovators at the European Innovation Council (EIC) Summit in Brussels.

top_signals.title: ABB to Equip Electric Tugs Under India Green Fleet Plan
top_signals.summary: ABB has secured a contract from Cochin Shipyard to supply power and propulsion systems for two electric tugs being built under India’s Green Tug Transition Program (GTTP).The vessels, due for delivery to Polestar Maritime in 2027, will operate out of the Jawaharlal Nehru Port Authority (JNPA)…
